candidate_summary: Prion templating (template-directed protein misfolding propagation) → template-based propagation of misrepresentations in LLM agent memory with cascade containment
reasoning: Mechanical rule: 8 hits, 3 forced. Substantive LLM prior art: 'From Spark to Fire' (2603.04474) explicitly models error cascades in LLM-MAS with directed dependency graphs and cascade amplification; MemoryGraft (2512.16962) documents self-reinforcing error cycles; Memory Poisoning (2601.05504) explicitly frames 'shared-memory contamination as social contagion'; A-MemGuard provides containment defense. The prion-specific template-misfolding framing is more biological-specific but the error-cascade-and-containment mechanism is heavily published.
